S.FORM: Toby Bailey sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1975, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 11, Toby Bailey, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
